aiCommentCN: 大家都说不差，但钱包一直在流泪
aiCommentEN: Prices drop, wallets cry silently always
aiSummaryCN:
【市场情绪】
当前比特币市场情绪偏空。
【情绪信号】
社交媒体讨论热度降低、散户活跃度下降、衍生品多空比偏空。
【短期展望】
未来几天可能继续震荡下行。
【一句提醒】
投资者应谨慎投资，关注市场信号变化。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Current bitcoin market sentiment is bearish.
[Key Drivers]
Social media discussion heat decreased, retail investor activity declined, and derivatives long-short ratio is bearish.
[Outlook]
It may continue to fluctuate downward in the next few days.
[Reminder]
Investors should invest cautiously and pay attention to changes in market signals.
